text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 A fight has erupted in the area of the targeted apartment that claimed the live of the Lebanese forces member Pierre Moawad. The cause is unclear at this moment. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Al Jadeed information on the recent airstrike that targeted the Metn area: Reports suggest that the person targeted in the Ain Saadeh area left the apartment before it was struck by the missile and was not injured. However, four casualties have been reported so far from the strike. Note that Pierre Moawad lives on the second floor of the targeted building, while the apartment hit is on the third floor. @wfwitness

🇮🇷 BREAKING:IRGC issues statement on the failed US rescue operation: "Following the desperate attempts of the American terrorist army to rescue the pilot of their downed fighter jet, a number of enemy aircraft entered Iran in the early hours of April 5th." Confirmed struck and forced into emergency landings south of Isfahan: 🔸 2 C-130 military transport planes 🔸 2 Black Hawk helicopters "After Iran's fighters completed the encirclement — the contemptible enemy, in order to prevent the disgrace of Trump and preserve the hollow prestige of their army, was forced to heavily bomb their own downed aircraft, equipment, commanders, and soldiers." Iran is now explicitly stating the US bombed its own trapped personnel to prevent capture. "The disgrace of the trapped president and the defeated American army cannot be repaired by rhetoric, media warfare, or psychological operations." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

🇮🇷 💥 🇺🇸 Some channels are circulating this image as though it were that of an American crew member involved in yesterday’s rescue operation. This is highly unlikely. The skull appears to be in a burnt out civilian car, unknown why it was at that site but hopefully not a random innocent. Furthermore, Americans are extremely unlikely to leave behind the deceased so carelessly. Credit where it’s due, American PJs and CRO’s are top-tier professionals of their field, their standards are thorough. While the American version of yesterday’s ordeal clearly hides a few things, given the Little Birds bent rotors and bullet punctures, optimistic fantasy can never substitute reality.

↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺🇷🇸Reuters: A former Hungarian intelligence official reports that there has been discussions of precise plan for a 'false falg' attack on the pipeline in Serbia in an effort to influence the vote in the upcoming Hungarian presidential elections. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇸 🇭🇺 Hungarian Foreign Minister Szijjártó accused Ukraine of being responsible for planting the explosives along the Serbian section of the Turkstream pipeline. @wfwitness

🇭🇺 🇷🇸 🇷🇺 ⚡️ 🇺🇦 Hungarian Prime Minister Orbán accuses Ukraine of sabotage and warns of direct threats to Hungary’s energy security: ~ Says a sabotage plot targeted the TurkStream pipeline section in Vojvodina ~ Claims Ukraine has long worked to cut Europe off from Russian energy ~ Accuses Kyiv of blowing up Nord Stream and shutting key pipelines ~ Says Hungary was placed under an “oil blockade” via the Druzhba pipeline ~ Warns TurkStream remains under continuous attack ~ Says Ukraine’s actions pose a direct threat to Hungary ~ “Hungary’s energy security is not a game.”

As I previously mentioned, Trump and his agent Netanyahu have no cards left to play besides bombing civilian infrastructure. Iran holds all the cards, and a long war of attrition is in their favor. The longer the war goes on, the more desperate Trump becomes.

🇮🇷 Images from the site of the HC-130J and MH-6 “Little Bird” helicopters south of Isfahan suggest possible shrapnel damage to the aircraft. This could indicate that the U.S. claim that the aircraft “got stuck” may mean they were too damaged to take off or may have crash-landed, as bent rotor blades visible in one image point toward a hard landing. However, this remains speculative. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

🇮🇷 Felt hat on the head. Bren gun on the shoulder. Love of the homeland in the heart. The tribes of Khuzestan, Kohgiluyeh and Boyer-Ahmad, and Chaharmahal and Bakhtiari have mobilized across the slopes of Mangasht Mountain searching for the downed American pilot. "They call the homeland 'mother.' A homeland that in times of war with the foreigner rekindles the fire of love across the Dena and Zagros mountains." IRIB reporter: the disruption to the US search and rescue operation is making things very difficult for the child-killing devil's army on the other side of the world. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇶🇦 🇹🇷 🇮🇷 WSJ: Iran has rejected proposals to reopen the Strait of Hormuz in exchange for a temporary ceasefire and is refusing to meet U.S. officials in Islamabad. Recent calls between the foreign ministers of the three mediating countries, Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi and U.S. Special Envoy Witkoff did not yield progress, with both sides remaining far apart. Diplomatic efforts are now shifting toward alternative venues such as Qatar or Istanbul, though Qatar has resisted taking on a central mediation role. @wfwitness

BIG: Hezbollah launched a shore-to-sea missile at a British warship approximately 70 nautical miles off the coast of Lebanon, after apparently mistaking it for an Israeli vessel. Israeli assessments indicate that the ship sustained damage. Source: N14
🟡 Footage of Hezbollah Targeting Israeli Army Humvee with Loitering Drone Near Mays al-Jabal Hospital

NEW: Regional countries including Türkiye, Egypt, and Pakistan are trying to bring Iran to negotiations with the U.S. to stop the war or secure a temporary cease-fire, but efforts have stalled. Iran has rejected proposals, including one to reopen the Strait of Hormuz in exchange for a cease-fire, and declined meeting U.S. officials. Source: WSJ

↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 The Israeli military has identified approximately 165 rocket launches by Hezbollah that have allegedly landed inside or adjacent to UNIFIL posts in southern Lebanon since the start of Operation Roaring Lion. The IDF said Hezbollah "systematically…" ⚡️ 🇺🇳 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 UNIFIL spokesperson Kandice Ardiel warned that ongoing exchanges of fire by Israeli forces and Hezbollah near its positions are placing peacekeepers at serious risk, following recent incidents of casualties among UN personnel. She accused both sides of firing projectiles and conducting operations in close proximity to UN positions, raising concerns that such actions could provoke return fire and further endanger peacekeepers. UNIFIL urged all parties to respect the safety and inviolability of United Nations premises and personnel, and called for an immediate move toward a ceasefire. @wfwitness

🇦🇪 🇬🇧 — Middle East Eye: A British flight attendant was arrested in the UAE after sharing a photo of a drone airstrike, highlighting an increasing crackdown on people documenting the war and raising questions about Dubai’s image as an open global hub. – A 25-year-old cabin crew member was detained after posting a photo of damage near Dubai International Airport in a private WhatsApp group. 🔴 @alsaa_plus_EN

🇮🇷 Tehran Prosecutor conducts a field inspection of food markets on Day 36 of the war: "No shortage of essential goods was observed. Rice prices unchanged. No shortage of meat, poultry, or fish. Reserves are in good condition." One shopper tells the reporter: "Actually better than before the war." Since Day 1 of what Iran calls the Third Imposed War, the judiciary has been tasked with special market oversight, with hotlines for reporting price gouging or supply refusals. The sanctions were supposed to break Iran, yet the shelves are full. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
⚡️ 🇮🇷 The moment of an Iranian missile launch from a site in southern Tehran earlier this Sunday. The destination of the missile cannot be confirmed. @wfwitness
